import heapq

def nth_super_ugly_number(n, primes):
    ugly_numbers = [1]
    heap = [(p, 0) for p in primes]
    heapq.heapify(heap)

    while len(ugly_numbers) < n:
        ugly_number, prime_index = heapq.heappop(heap)
        ugly_numbers.append(ugly_number)
        while heap and heap[0][0] == ugly_number:
            ugly_number, prime_index = heapq.heappop(heap)
        ugly_number *= primes[prime_index]
        heapq.heappush(heap, (ugly_number, prime_index))

    return ugly_numbers[-1]
